title: Walk-in Drive Logistics Manager at Gati

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Logistics Manager at Gati
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Gati. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Logistics Manager to strengthen our Amritsar-based team.

About Gati:
Gati is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in Fleet Management
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in Vendor Management

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Gati!
